payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Close-up of a white glazed ceramic sink showing the curved oval rim and top of the basin with a smooth glossy surface and slight shadowing; the basin is edge-cropped at the bottom of the image and appears to be about 0.4 m from the camera.
